race.description: Milton Ex Servos Club Ulladulla Cup Hcp
race.comment: CASINO SHAW (7) sharp mare who gets her chance today over the pet trip. Three weeks between runs when she sat on the good tempo with a game second over 1205m at the Sapphire Coast. Can take control from the front and get the job done on the home track. MISSILE LEADER (4) blinkers come off and back in trip after he covered ground early with a below par sixth over 1600m at Albury. Finds a weaker race from the low gate. Each way player. BEAUER (8) knocked up late in the heavy conditions first-up when seventh over 1300m at Coffs Harbour. Extra trip in her favour on the firmer surface. Minor place contender. CHAIRMAN'S LIST (9) indicated he was back on track with a tough on-pace fourth over 1405m at the Sapphire Coast. Can roll forward from the draw and stays in the mix. CARAVANSERAI (3) fitter now and back in grade.
